name: GitHub, Actions
description: Most recent CI runs across watched repos. Each workflow row pairs its conclusion icon + a workflow-type glyph (build / test / deploy / lint / docs / release / security / ci) with a mini timeline of the last 8 runs (bar height ∝ duration, colour ∝ conclusion) and the latest run's duration. Public repos work without a token; private repos require the PAT in Plugins → GitHub Core.
